text.heading: XXX UNIVERSITY
XXX, NIGERIA
text.p: Department of Linguistics and African Languages
text.heading: CURRENT PERSPECTIVES IN PHONO-SYNTAX AND DIALECTOLOGY

p.italics: Re: Submission of manuscript for publication in Current Perspectives in Phono-Syntax and Dialectology edited by and

text.p: We acknowledge the receipt of your manuscript sent for publication in Current Perspectives in Phono-Syntax and Dialectology. We also acknowledge the receipt of your reworked manuscript after our assessors' comments. We are happy to inform you that your contribution has been accepted as a Chapter in the book entitled Current Perspectives in Phono-Syntax and Dialectology. The book is due for publication before the end of 2009 by University Press, . The publishers will however require camera ready copy of the manuscript for further processing, putting the cost of copy editing on the shoulders of individual contributors.

We shall be glad if you pay into the account below* the sum of $ to defray the cost of assessment fees, copy editing and postage on or before 10th December, 2009. Efforts are underway (and it is 100% certain) to make the book available to you and the public on or before 21st December 2009. Thank you for your understanding. Please after effecting the payment, do send us definite postage address for authors complimentary copies (use the email addresses above). Thank you.
Please note that the account is USD denominated only.

p.italics: Current Perspectives in Phono-Syntax and Dialectology
